member.name: T:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController
member.summary: Manages the game state by processing events from the network controller and providing thread-safe snapshots to the rendering layer.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.PlayerId
member.summary: The server-assigned player ID for this client.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.WorldSize
member.summary: The world size received from the server.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.OnStateUpdated
member.summary: Raised when game state changes; consumers should call StateHasChanged.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.#ctor(GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController)
member.summary: Initializes the game controller and subscribes to network events.
member.param: The network controller to subscribe to. Must not be null.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.GetSnakes
member.summary: Returns a thread-safe deep-copied snapshot of all snakes.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.GetWalls
member.summary: Returns a thread-safe snapshot of all walls.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.GetPowerups
member.summary: Returns a thread-safe snapshot of all powerups.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.OnPlayerDied
member.summary: Fires when the current player dies. Raised once per death event.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.GetPlayerSnake
member.summary: Returns a deep copy of the current player's snake, or null.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects to the game server and enters the initialization phase.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.Disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects from the server and clears all local game state.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.SendMoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a movement command to the server if the handshake is complete.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.CommitPendingStateIfInitializing
member.summary: Commits pending initialization data and resets collections for the new session. Called once when the first snake or powerup arrives after connecting.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController.MergeSnakeFields(GUI.Components.Models.Snake,GUI.Components.Models.Snake)
member.summary: Merges non-null fields from an incoming update into the existing snake record.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController
member.summary: Handles the TCP connection to the Snake server, parsing the line-delimited protocol (player ID, world size, then JSON objects) and raising typed events.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.PlayerId
member.summary: The player ID received during the handshake.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.WorldSize
member.summary: The world size received during the handshake.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnPlayerIdReceived
member.summary: Raised when the server sends the player ID.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnWorldSizeReceived
member.summary: Raised when the server sends the world size.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnWallReceived
member.summary: Raised for each wall object received.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnSnakeReceived
member.summary: Raised for each snake object received.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnPowerupReceived
member.summary: Raised for each powerup object received.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnConnected
member.summary: Raised when the handshake (player ID + world size) completes.

member.name: E:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Raised when the connection is lost or closed.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether the underlying TCP client is currently connected.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the server, sends the player name and skin index, and starts the read loop.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.SendMoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a JSON movement command to the server.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.Disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects and clears connection state.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources held by this controller.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.CancelTokenSource
member.summary: Cancels the token source if it has not already been cancelled.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.DisposeConnectionResources
member.summary: Disposes the reader, writer, and TCP client, tolerating already-disposed resources.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Controllers.NetworkController.ReconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempt to reconnect using the last-known host/port/name with exponential backoff.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.Point2D
member.summary: Represents a 2D coordinate or direction vector in the game world. Used for positions, directions, and body segments.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Point2D.X
member.summary: Horizontal coordinate (positive = right).

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Point2D.Y
member.summary: Vertical coordinate (positive = down).

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Models.Point2D.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new at the origin (0, 0).

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Models.Point2D.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new at the given coordinates.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.Powerup
member.summary: Represents a collectible powerup at a location in the game world. When consumed by a snake the server marks it as died.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Powerup.Id
member.summary: Server-assigned unique powerup identifier.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Powerup.Location
member.summary: World-space location of the powerup, or null if unknown.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Powerup.Died
member.summary: Whether this powerup has been consumed or removed.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.Snake
member.summary: Represents a snake in the game world, including its body segments, direction, score, and lifecycle state.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Id
member.summary: Server-assigned unique snake identifier.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Name
member.summary: Player-chosen display name.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Body
member.summary: Ordered list of body segment vertices (tail first, head last).

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Direction
member.summary: Current movement direction vector.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Score
member.summary: Number of powerups collected.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Died
member.summary: Whether the snake died this frame.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Alive
member.summary: Whether the snake is currently alive.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Disconnected
member.summary: Whether the player has disconnected.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Joined
member.summary: Whether the player just joined this frame.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Skin
member.summary: Index into for the snake's visual appearance.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Models.Snake.Clone
member.summary: Returns a deep copy to prevent cross-thread mutation during rendering.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin
member.summary: Defines the visual appearance of a snake including body pattern. To add a new skin, append an entry to .

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.Name
member.summary: Human-readable skin name shown in the picker.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.BodyColor
member.summary: Primary body color.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.BodyAccent
member.summary: Secondary color for stripe/checker/diamond patterns. Null = solid body.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.BodyAccent2
member.summary: Third color used alternating with accent in multi-color patterns.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.Pattern
member.summary: Body pattern type rendered on the canvas.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.BellyColor
member.summary: Belly (underside) highlight color drawn as a thinner line on top of the body.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.OutlineColor
member.summary: Outline/border color around the body. Null = dark semi-transparent default.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.HeadColor
member.summary: Color of the head circle.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.EyeColor
member.summary: Sclera (white of eye) color.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.PupilColor
member.summary: Pupil color.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.DeathColor
member.summary: Color used for death-explosion particles.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin.AllSkins
member.summary: All available skins. Add new skins here — they automatically appear in the picker.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern
member.summary: Pattern types that can be applied to a snake's body.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern.Solid
member.summary: Single solid color.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern.Stripe
member.summary: Alternating color bands along the body.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern.Checker
member.summary: Checkerboard dots along the body.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern.Diamond
member.summary: Diamond-shaped scale marks.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Models.BodyPattern.Wave
member.summary: Sinusoidal wave dots along the body.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Models.Wall
member.summary: Represents a wall segment defined by two endpoints in the game world. Walls are axis-aligned: either and share an X coordinate (vertical) or a Y coordinate (horizontal).

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Wall.Id
member.summary: Server-assigned unique wall identifier.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Wall.Point1
member.summary: First endpoint of the wall segment.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Models.Wall.Point2
member.summary: Second endpoint of the wall segment.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer
member.summary: Handles all HTML5 canvas drawing for the Snake game. Extracted from SnakeGUI.razor to keep rendering logic separate from UI concerns.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.SnakeWidth
member.summary: Width of the snake body stroke in pixels.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim
member.summary: Tracks a per-snake death explosion animation.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim.ElapsedSeconds
member.summary: Seconds elapsed since the explosion started.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim.Path
member.summary: The body path captured at death.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim.Skin
member.summary: Visual appearance to render during the explosion.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim.IsFinished
member.summary: Whether the animation has fully played out.

member.name: T:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.CameraState
member.summary: Smooth camera state for a viewport.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.CameraState.X
member.summary: Current camera X position.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.CameraState.Y
member.summary: Current camera Y position.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.CameraState.Initialized
member.summary: Whether the camera has been initialized to a target.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.CameraState.Reset
member.summary: Resets camera to the uninitialized state.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.ClearWallCache(GUI.Components.Controllers.GameController)
member.summary: Clears the cached wall cell grid for the given controller.

member.name: F:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.PreviewPath
member.summary: Static wavy path for the skin preview canvases.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DrawSkinPreview(Blazor.Extensions.Canvas.Canvas2D.Canvas2DContext,GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin)
member.summary: Draws a skin preview on a small canvas.
Draws one viewport (full-screen or half in split mode). Sets up camera transform, draws background, grid, entities, and restores state.
member.returns: The screen-space head position of the player snake (for scoreboard dithering).

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DrawDeathAnimations(Blazor.Extensions.Canvas.Canvas2D.Canvas2DContext,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Int32,GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DeathAnim})
member.summary: Draws active death explosion animations and advances their timers.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DrawRoundRect(Blazor.Extensions.Canvas.Canvas2D.Canvas2DContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Draws a rounded rectangle path (caller must Fill or Stroke after).

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.ResolveSkin(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Resolves a skin from the server-provided index, falling back to the default.

member.name: M:GUI.Components.Rendering.SnakeRenderer.DrawSnakeBody(Blazor.Extensions.Canvas.Canvas2D.Canvas2DContext,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{GUI.Components.Models.Point2D},GUI.Components.Models.SnakeSkin)
member.summary: Draws a complete snake (outline, fill, pattern, belly, specular, head + eyes).

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Shared.SkinGrid.SelectedIndex
member.summary: Index of the currently selected skin.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Shared.SkinGrid.OnSkinSelected
member.summary: Callback invoked when the user clicks a skin tile.

member.name: P:GUI.Components.Shared.SkinGrid.IdPrefix
member.summary: Prefix for SVG clip-path IDs to avoid collisions between P1/P2.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
